skill.name: maxhub-wechat
skill.description: MaxHub WeChat integration for accessing WeChat Official Accounts and Channels data through 20 APIs. Supports article details, comments, video content search, and creator analytics.
skill.summary: WeChat Official Accounts and Channels data integration via MaxHub API
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate MaxHub API client for WeChat data collection. Static analysis detected 95 potential issues, but evaluation confirmed most are FALSE POSITIVES. The external_commands flags were triggered by markdown backtick formatting of API paths, not actual shell execution. Network flags are legitimate MaxHub service URLs. Environment variable access is expected for API key authentication. The skill includes proper rate limits, cost controls, and security documentation.

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
medium_findings.description: Skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables for authentication. This is legitimate API key usage, not a security vulnerability. The API key grants access to WeChat data through MaxHub's proxy service.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Environment variable access is confirmed legitimate API authentication, not credential exfiltration. No evidence of key forwarding to third parties.

low_findings.title: Markdown Backtick Formatting Misidentified as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged backtick characters (`) in markdown as 'Ruby/shell backtick execution'. These are API path markers in documentation (e.g., `/api/v1/wechat_mp/...`), not actual code execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Files contain only markdown documentation. No shell scripts or executable code present. Backticks are markdown code span syntax.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs Are Legitimate Service Endpoints
low_findings.description: Hardcoded URLs (aconfig.cn, gitee.com) are legitimate MaxHub platform endpoints documented in the skill metadata. No malicious destinations detected.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs point to aconfig.cn MaxHub service. Verified against skill metadata and security documentation. No suspicious endpoints.

low_findings.title: High File Entropy Caused by Chinese Unicode Text
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged high entropy due to Chinese characters in YAML frontmatter and documentation. Chinese Unicode text has higher byte entropy than ASCII, but is not encrypted or obfuscated content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Files contain only markdown with bilingual content. Entropy flags triggered by Unicode multi-byte encoding, not actual obfuscation.

low_findings.title: Function Names Misidentified as System Commands
low_findings.description: API function names like 'fetch_mp_article_detail_json' triggered 'system reconnaissance' flags. These are API endpoint identifiers, not system commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Function names follow API naming conventions documented in API catalog. No actual system commands present.

content.user_title: Analyze WeChat content and creator data
content.value_statement: Access WeChat Official Accounts articles, comments, and Channels video content through a unified API. This skill enables data-driven content analysis without manual scraping.
actual_capabilities: Fetch WeChat Official Account article details (JSON and HTML formats)
Retrieve article comments and comment replies from Official Accounts
Search WeChat Channels videos by keywords, users, and trending topics
Get creator profiles, video details, and live stream archives
Access hot topics and trending content across WeChat platform
Fetch article read counts, related articles, and ad information
limitations: Requires MaxHub API key for authentication
API calls are rate-limited and incur per-request charges
Cannot perform engagement actions (likes, comments) - data retrieval only

use_cases.title: Social media analysts tracking WeChat content
use_cases.description: Pull article metrics, engagement data, and trending topics to build competitive analysis reports for clients in the Chinese market.

use_cases.title: Content creators researching competitor performance
use_cases.description: Search for similar content across WeChat Channels, analyze top creators in your niche, and identify trending topics for content planning.

use_cases.title: Researchers collecting public WeChat data
use_cases.description: Gather public article content, comments, and creator information for academic research on Chinese social media trends.

prompt_templates.title: Find trending WeChat content
prompt_templates.prompt: Search WeChat Channels for [keyword] videos from the past week and show me the top 10 results with their view counts.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to find popular content on a topic

prompt_templates.title: Analyze a WeChat article
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the full details of this WeChat article: [URL]. Include the article text, author info, and any engagement metrics available.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides a specific article link

prompt_templates.title: Research a WeChat creator
prompt_templates.prompt: Find information about the WeChat Channels creator [username]. Show their profile, recent videos, and follower metrics if available.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to research a specific creator

prompt_templates.title: Bulk content analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for articles about [topic] from Official Accounts. Get details on the first 20 results including publication date and read counts.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user needs to analyze multiple articles

output_examples.input: Search for WeChat videos about 'coffee recipes'
output_examples.output:

1. 'Best Coffee Recipes 2024' - 12.5K views
2. 'Iced Coffee Tutorial' - 8.3K views
3. 'Coffee Art Techniques' - 5.1K views

Creator: CoffeeLab Official - 45K followers

Author: Productivity Expert
Published: 2024-01-15
Read Count: 15,000+
Comments: 234

best_practices: Check your MaxHub account balance before running batch queries to avoid service interruption
Use specific keywords and filters to reduce API calls and costs
Paginate large result sets rather than requesting maximum items in one call
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill to collect personal user data without consent
Do not ignore rate limit warnings - excessive calls may trigger account suspension
Do not assume real-time data - WeChat data may have caching delays

faq.question: What is MaxHub and why do I need an API key?
faq.answer: MaxHub provides a unified API for accessing WeChat platform data. You need to register at aconfig.cn and obtain an API key to use this skill.

faq.question: Can I post comments or like content with this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill only retrieves public data. It cannot perform engagement actions like posting comments or likes.

faq.question: How much does WeChat data access cost?
faq.answer: MaxHub charges per API call. Check your account balance and set cost alert thresholds to avoid unexpected charges.

faq.question: Is the data real-time or cached?
faq.answer: WeChat data may have caching delays. For analytics purposes, data may reflect content from hours ago rather than real-time.

faq.question: What platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports WeChat Official Accounts (公众号) and WeChat Channels (视频号) for articles, comments, videos, and creator data.

faq.question: Can I use this for competitive intelligence research?
faq.answer: Yes, you can analyze public content, engagement metrics, and trending topics for competitive analysis and market research.
